title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.1a
sections: RUIN - BLADE OF THE RUINED KING
paragraphs: Long have we awaited, our favorite Ruined Monarch is finally here on the Rift (soon™). And with him, a first for Wild Rift: Final Stand, our newest PvE mode. If that wasn’t enough, we’ve got new events, skins, and Companions. Last but not least, your regularly scheduled balance updates are here as well. Welcome to patch 5.1a.
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Once ruler of a long-lost kingdom, Viego perished over a thousand years ago when his attempt to bring his wife back from the dead triggered the magical catastrophe known as the Ruination. Transformed into a powerful, unliving wraith tortured by an obsessive longing for his centuries-dead queen, Viego now stands as the Ruined King, controlling the deadly Harrowings as he scours Runeterra for anything that might one day restore her, and destroying all in his path as the Black Mist pours endlessly from his cruel, broken heart.
Viego will be released on May 8 at 00:01 UTC.
Our first PVE mode is here! Play as Kalista as she fights off waves of the Iron Order. Will you be the last one standing? Of course, we also have missions to complete and goodies to claim!
Final Stand will be available on April 30 at 00:01 UTC.
Play games, complete missions, and earn goodies such as Skin Vouchers, Rift Emblem, and Kill Bauble!
The Ink Splendor event begins April 28 at 00:01 UTC

Looking for the opportunity to finally get your hands on Jade Dragon Wukong (Special Edition) or Dragon Fist Lee Sin (Special Edition)? Now’s your chance! Not feeling those two? We also have the Calligraphia pool available for draws. The first 5x roll will have a guaranteed premium reward! For drop rates, head to our Player Support page.
During the event period when you reload on Wild Cores, reaching milestone amounts will earn you rewards such as Skin Vouchers, Calligraphia Keys, and more!
The Spender’s Splendorous Gifts event begins April 28 at 00:01 UTC
Join us in welcoming Viego’s arrival with his new event! Complete missions and earn rewards!
The Viego’s Arrival event begins May 8 at 00:01 UTC
SLEEPY TROUBLE BUBBLE
We’re boosting the cost-efficiency of Force of Nature so it can become a more desirable pickup when you’re against an AP-heavy team.
The health reduction has been more impactful than intended, especially in the early game. We’re adjusting it so it’s still a valuable pickup, but toning it down just a bit.
We're also adjusting the health reduction that Infinity Edge grants as it was stronger than we intended.
We’re adjusting the numbers of Rabadon’s Deathcap to make it a more reasonable pick up.
We’ve increased the cost efficiency of Thornmail to make it a reliable item for pickup when you’re combating champions with a lot of Health Regen or Healing.
We’re introducing an upper limit for the amount of Armor and Magic Penetration gained with Terminus.
We’re adjusting the amount of Armor Penetration Youmuu’s grants so it’s a more desirable choice when facing a team that is stacking armor.
We’re adjusting the damage it provides to make sure it’s not overwhelming when combined with other items and runes.
Since Kraken Slayer has been removed, sustained damage from Marksmen has taken a hit. We’re buffing Empowered Attack to empower Marksmen to continue their skirmishes.
